prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 云南大学为211工程、双一流建设 高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升：2021年第83→2022年第82→2023年第80→2024年第70→2025年第69→2026年第71，整体稳定在全国70名左右，属于中上游综合类高校；2025年声誉评价偏负面（主要因生命科学学院就业率数据引发关注）；抖音热度总排名第62、评价"一般"，短视频平台曝光量中等偏低；未见明显投档断档记录。负面 舆情可能对报考热度产生一定抑制；第五轮学科评估：民族学A+、生态学A、统计学A-。统计学与招生专业中的统计学、数据科学与大数据技术等直接关联；生 态学与环境科学与工程类、生物科学等专业相关，对相关方向考生有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，云南大学在计 算机类、电子信息类、数据科学等方向均有招生，可能吸引高分考生；本省2026年物理类考生约167419人，较2025年173347人减少约3.4%，竞争略有缓解 ，；云南大学位于云南省昆明市，对山西考生属于跨省报考；该校在山西招生规模较小（约50余人），本地招生占比不高，地域偏好因素影响有限。 综合2025年基准位次约32969名、2026年扩招约7.5%、本省物理类考生减少约3.4%以及声誉偏负面等因素，扩招效应与考生减少部分抵消，声誉 负面略抑制热度；预测2026年最低位次约34162名，区间33662–34662名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (including physics category) were approximately 13105 → 31548 → 15459 → 13719 → 32969. In 2022, there was an abnormal ranking due to the Sino-foreign cooperative education batch; from 2023 to 2024, it stabilized around 14,000; in 2025, due to the new college entrance examination reform (physics category) with detailed major groups, the ranking for the unrestricted subject group significantly dropped to about 32969, becoming the latest benchmark. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Shanxi Province: 54 in 2021, 53 in 2022, 55 in 2023, 52 in 2024, 53 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 57, an increase of 4 students (about +7.5%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yunnan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have been steadily rising in recent years: 83rd in 2021 → 82nd in 2022 → 80th in 2023 → 70th in 2024 → 69th in 2025 → 71st in 2026, overall stable around 70th nationally, belonging to mid-to-upper comprehensive universities; the 2025 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (mainly due to attention from the employment rate data of the School of Life Sciences); Douyin popularity ranks 62nd overall, with a rating of 'average', and short video platform exposure is moderately low; no obvious filing gaps have been recorded. Negative public opinion may somewhat suppress application enthusiasm; the fifth round of discipline evaluation: Ethnology A+, Ecology A, Statistics A-. Statistics is directly related to enrollment majors such as Statistics and Data Science and Big Data Technology; Ecology is related to Environmental Science and Engineering, Biological Sciences, etc., attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended. Yunnan University enrolls in Computer Science, Electronic Information, Data Science, etc., which may attract high-scoring candidates; the number of physics category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition; Yunnan University is located in Kunming, Yunnan Province, which is a cross-province application for Shanxi candidates; the university's enrollment scale in Shanxi is relatively small (about 50 people), with a low local enrollment proportion, so regional preference factors have limited impact. Considering the 2025 benchmark ranking of about 32969, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 7.5%, the decrease in physics category candidates in the province of about 3.4%, and the somewhat negative reputation, the expansion effect and candidate reduction partially offset each other, with negative reputation slightly suppressing enthusiasm; the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 34162, with a range of 33662–34662.

It is recommended that candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 33662 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors (Computer Science, Data Science, Electronic Information); candidates with rankings around 34162 should mainly target Tier 2 majors (Mathematics, Statistics, Law, Clinical Medicine); candidates with rankings near the upper limit of 34662 are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options (Chemistry, Materials, Business Administration, etc.), while also paying attention to admission opportunities brought by the enrollment expansion.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (including history category) was approximately 1841 → 2626 → 3142 → 2440 → 4893. From 2021 to 2024, the overall range fluctuated between 1800 and 3100. In 2025, due to the new college entrance examination reform (history category) with detailed major groups, the ranking for the unrestricted subject group shifted to about 4893, becoming the latest baseline. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Shanxi Province: 18 in 2021, 20 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 21 in 2024, 15 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 16, an increase of 1 student compared to 2025 (about +6.7%), a small expansion with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yunnan University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science ranking has been stable around 70th in recent years (71st in 2026), placing it among mid-to-upper comprehensive universities, with good appeal to liberal arts students. In 2025, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (employment data issues). On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 62nd with a 'fair' rating, and exposure is moderately low. No records of admission gaps were found. Negative public opinion has a certain dampening effect on application enthusiasm, but the impact is limited. Ethnology (A+) is Yunnan University's flagship discipline, related to enrollment majors such as Sociology and Political Science and Administration. Ecology (A) and Statistics (A-) are science-oriented, with weaker direct relevance to liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially popular/recommended. Yunnan University offers enrollment in Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism, etc. In 2026, the number of history category examinees in the province is about 63,113, a significant decrease of about 25.6% from 84,879 in 2025, greatly easing competition. Yunnan University is located in the Southwest region, making it a cross-province choice for Shanxi liberal arts students. The university's enrollment scale in Shanxi for liberal arts is small (about 15–20 students), so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of about 4893, a small enrollment expansion of about 6.7% in 2026, and a significant decrease of about 25.6% in the number of history category examinees in the province, the sharp drop in examinee numbers is the core factor driving the ranking forward (easier admission). The predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 4889, with a range of 4389–5389.
